title: nonux kernel composition
description: kernel.json — declarative composition of the running kernel. Names every slot, picks an implementation per slot, supplies per-component config, and lists any static connection overrides.

target.description: Build target triple / identifier, e.g. aarch64-qemu-virt.

components.description: Map of slot name → binding. Slot names must be valid C identifier fragments; dots are allowed to namespace (e.g. char_device.serial).

connections.description: Static connection overrides — extra edges not derivable from component manifests. Optional.

hooks.description: Hook declarations. Shape finalised in slice 3.8.

posix.description: POSIX shim configuration. Shape finalised in Phase 7.

impl.description: Component manifest name that fills this slot. Must match a component under components/<impl>/manifest.json.

config.description: Per-instance configuration values emitted into gen/config.h.

iface.description: Required interface for this slot. Optional in 3.5; validated in 3.7.
